parameters.name: organization_membership_id
parameters.description: The ID of the organization membership.

parameters.name: before
parameters.description: An object ID that defines your place in the list. When the ID is not present, you are at the end of the list. For example, if you make a list request and receive 100 objects, ending with `"obj_123"`, your subsequent call can include `before="obj_123"` to fetch a new batch of objects before `"obj_123"`.

parameters.name: after
parameters.description: An object ID that defines your place in the list. When the ID is not present, you are at the end of the list. For example, if you make a list request and receive 100 objects, ending with `"obj_123"`, your subsequent call can include `after="obj_123"` to fetch a new batch of objects after `"obj_123"`.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Upper limit on the number of objects to return, between `1` and `100`.

parameters.name: order
parameters.description: Order the results by the creation time. Supported values are `"asc"` (ascending), `"desc"` (descending), and `"normal"` (descending with reversed cursor semantics where `before` fetches older records and `after` fetches newer records).

parameters.name: resource_id
parameters.description: Filter assignments by the ID of the resource.

parameters.name: resource_external_id
parameters.description: Filter assignments by the external ID of the resource.

parameters.name: resource_type_slug
parameters.description: Filter assignments by the slug of the resource type.
